title: Additional coin types
description: Expand payment support beyond Zcash Sapling. Monero (XMR) is the primary target: monero-rs light-wallet client, stealth address generation, ring signature verification. Bitcoin Lightning (LDK or CLN REST) and MobileCoin are secondary candidates. Required: abstract the coin interface so /pay dispatches to the right chain; Monero remote node connection, stealth address generation, incoming tx watching; Lightning invoice generation and BOLT11 parsing; chain selection UX in /pay command; relay stays blind to which chain is in use.
close_reason: Monero keys/subaddresses (nie-monero crate), CoinWallet trait, CLI Monero /pay and /receive all implemented
